mapper.insert: INSERT INTO usuario ("nombre","apellidoPaterno","apellidoMaterno", "email","telefono","username","password","estatus","idRol","tiempoCreacion") VALUES (#{nombre},#{apellidoPaterno},#{apellidoMaterno},#{email}, #{telefono},#{username},#{password},CAST(#{estatus} AS BIT),#{idRol},CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
